prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘wish someone well’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來祝願上帝保佑或幫助某人，也可作為溫暖的告別語」？

example.text: God bless you, and have a safe trip home.

translation.zh-Hant: 願上帝保佑你，祝你平安返家。

meaning.en: Used to wish that God will protect or help someone, or as a warm farewell.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來祝願上帝保佑或幫助某人，也可作為溫暖的告別語。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘polite farewell remark’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來禮貌道別的一句話」？

example.text: She ended the call with a cheerful “Good day.”

translation.zh-Hant: 她以愉快的一句「再會」結束通話。

meaning.en: A polite remark used to say goodbye.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來禮貌道別的一句話。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in an authorized role’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以正式身分或職務」？

example.text: Mina is officially in charge of the regional office.

translation.zh-Hant: Mina 正式負責區域辦公室。

meaning.en: In an official role or capacity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以正式身分或職務。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘portable magnetic tape cartridge’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「內含雙軸磁帶的小型扁盒，可用來錄製及播放聲音或影像」？

example.text: I found an old cassette of our family recordings.

translation.zh-Hant: 我找到一卷錄有家人聲音的舊卡式錄音帶。

meaning.en: A small flat case containing magnetic tape on two reels, used to record and play audio or video.
meaning.zh-Hant: 內含雙軸磁帶的小型扁盒，可用來錄製及播放聲音或影像。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘continue for a set time’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「持續一段特定時間」？

example.text: The workshop will run for three hours.

translation.zh-Hant: 這場工作坊將持續三小時。

meaning.en: To continue for a particular period of time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 持續一段特定時間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ledger for financial records’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來記錄財務帳目的簿冊，也就是帳簿」？

example.text: The shopkeeper recorded every payment in the account book.

translation.zh-Hant: 店主把每筆款項都記在帳簿裡。

meaning.en: A book in which financial accounts are recorded; a ledger.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來記錄財務帳目的簿冊，也就是帳簿。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘legal control of property’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「擁有並控制財產的狀態或行為」？

example.text: Ownership of the apartment was transferred to the buyer.

translation.zh-Hant: 這間公寓的所有權已移轉給買方。

meaning.en: The state or act of having and controlling property.
meaning.zh-Hant: 擁有並控制財產的狀態或行為。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘load of transported goods’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以任何運輸方式一起運送的一批貨物」？

example.text: The next shipment of medical supplies arrives on Friday.

translation.zh-Hant: 下一批醫療用品將於星期五抵達。

meaning.en: A load of goods transported together by any method.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以任何運輸方式一起運送的一批貨物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person you work with’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「和你一起工作的人，也就是同事」？

example.text: A workmate showed me how to use the new system.

translation.zh-Hant: 一位同事教我如何使用新系統。

meaning.en: A person who works with you; a fellow worker.
meaning.zh-Hant: 和你一起工作的人，也就是同事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘official or financial support’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「提供正式支持或資金援助的行為」？

example.text: The festival depends on sponsorship from local businesses.

translation.zh-Hant: 這場節慶活動仰賴當地企業贊助。

meaning.en: The act of providing official or financial support.
meaning.zh-Hant: 提供正式支持或資金援助的行為。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘working against the goal’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不但無助於達成目標，反而會造成阻礙」？

example.text: Skipping staff training would be counterproductive.

translation.zh-Hant: 省略員工訓練反而會妨礙目標達成。

meaning.en: Tending to hinder rather than help the achievement of a goal.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不但無助於達成目標，反而會造成阻礙。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘worthy of belief’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「看起來值得相信或接受」？

example.text: The witness gave a credible explanation of what happened.

translation.zh-Hant: 目擊者對事情經過提出了可信的說明。

meaning.en: Appearing worthy of belief or acceptance.
meaning.zh-Hant: 看起來值得相信或接受。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ability to adapt’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「能夠適應或變動的特質」？

example.text: Flexible hours give parents more flexibility at work.

translation.zh-Hant: 彈性工時讓家長在工作安排上更有調整空間。

meaning.en: The quality of being adaptable or able to vary.
meaning.zh-Hant: 能夠適應或變動的特質。

plainExpression: card briefly shown to a class

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘card briefly shown to a class’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「印有文字、數字或圖片，由老師短暫展示給全班看的字卡」？

example.text: The teacher held up a flashcard showing the number eight.

translation.zh-Hant: 老師舉起一張寫著數字八的字卡。

meaning.en: A card with words, numbers, or pictures that a teacher briefly shows to a class.
meaning.zh-Hant: 印有文字、數字或圖片，由老師短暫展示給全班看的字卡。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘temporary postponement’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「把某件事延後到日後進行的行為或情況」？

example.text: The borrower requested a six-month deferment of payments.

translation.zh-Hant: 借款人申請延後六個月付款。

meaning.en: An act or instance of delaying something until a later time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 把某件事延後到日後進行的行為或情況。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘act as a substitute’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「代替某人履行其角色或職務」？

example.text: Lena will deputize for the manager during his trip.

translation.zh-Hant: 經理出差期間，Lena 將代理他的職務。

meaning.en: To act as a substitute for someone in their role or office.
meaning.zh-Hant: 代替某人履行其角色或職務。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘excessive production output’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「生產量超過需求或預期」？

example.text: Overproduction left the factory with unsold inventory.

translation.zh-Hant: 生產過剩使工廠留下大量未售出的庫存。

meaning.en: Production in an amount greater than needed or expected.
meaning.zh-Hant: 生產量超過需求或預期。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘market dominated by two sellers’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「市場大多由兩家賣方掌控的經濟狀態」？

example.text: The merger created a duopoly in the mobile phone market.

translation.zh-Hant: 這起合併使手機市場形成由兩家業者主導的雙占局面。

meaning.en: A market condition in which two sellers exert most of the control.
meaning.zh-Hant: 市場大多由兩家賣方掌控的經濟狀態。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘unrestricted international commerce’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「幾乎不受政府干預的國際貿易」？

example.text: The agreement promotes free trade between the two countries.

translation.zh-Hant: 這項協定促進兩國之間的自由貿易。

meaning.en: International trade with little or no government interference.
meaning.zh-Hant: 幾乎不受政府干預的國際貿易。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘public launch of shares’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將一批股份投入市場交易，通常屬於新股發行」？

example.text: The company is preparing a flotation on the stock market.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家公司正準備在股票市場公開上市。

meaning.en: The launch of a block of shares onto the market, usually as a new issue.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將一批股份投入市場交易，通常屬於新股發行。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘state of thriving’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「興盛或享有好運的狀態」？

example.text: Stable employment brought greater prosperity to the region.

translation.zh-Hant: 穩定的就業為該地區帶來更大的繁榮。

meaning.en: The condition of prospering or enjoying good fortune.
meaning.zh-Hant: 興盛或享有好運的狀態。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘driven to act’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「受到動機或誘因驅使而採取行動」？

example.text: The bonus kept the sales team motivated.

translation.zh-Hant: 這筆獎金讓業務團隊更有工作動力。

meaning.en: Given a motive or incentive to take action.
meaning.zh-Hant: 受到動機或誘因驅使而採取行動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘policy of government noninterference’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「政府不干預經濟事務的政策」？

example.text: The minister argued for laissez faire in private markets.

translation.zh-Hant: 部長主張政府對民間市場採取自由放任政策。

meaning.en: A policy of government noninterference in economic affairs.
meaning.zh-Hant: 政府不干預經濟事務的政策。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘levy based on land value’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「依土地價值課徵，且不計建築物與其他改良物的稅」？

example.text: The city calculates land tax without counting the house on the lot.

translation.zh-Hant: 市政府計算地價稅時，不把土地上的房屋價值算入。

meaning.en: A levy on land value that disregards buildings and other improvements.
meaning.zh-Hant: 依土地價值課徵，且不計建築物與其他改良物的稅。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘damaging to someone's reputation’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「具有誹謗性，尤其因惡意或罔顧事實而可能損害他人名譽」？

example.text: The newspaper withdrew the libelous accusation and apologized.

translation.zh-Hant: 報社撤回那項誹謗性指控並道歉。

meaning.en: Defamatory and likely to harm someone's reputation, especially maliciously or recklessly.
meaning.zh-Hant: 具有誹謗性，尤其因惡意或罔顧事實而可能損害他人名譽。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person in public office’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「擔任職務的人，尤指經任命或選舉產生的公職人員」？

example.text: Every officeholder must disclose potential conflicts of interest.

translation.zh-Hant: 每位公職人員都必須揭露潛在的利益衝突。

meaning.en: A person who holds an office, especially an appointed or elected public position.
meaning.zh-Hant: 擔任職務的人，尤指經任命或選舉產生的公職人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘worker who packs goods’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以包裝物品為工作的人，尤指為保存食品而進行包裝的人」？

example.text: A packer sealed the food before it entered cold storage.

translation.zh-Hant: 包裝員在食品送入冷藏庫前將它密封。

meaning.en: A person whose job is to pack things, especially food for preservation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以包裝物品為工作的人，尤指為保存食品而進行包裝的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘agency that grants patents’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「有權核發專利的官方機構」？

example.text: The patent office approved the inventor's application.

translation.zh-Hant: 專利局核准了發明人的申請。

meaning.en: An official organization authorized to issue patents.
meaning.zh-Hant: 有權核發專利的官方機構。

plainExpression: person in charge of postal branch

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person in charge of postal branch’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「負責管理郵局的人」？

example.text: The postmaster oversees daily operations at the local post office.

translation.zh-Hant: 郵局局長負責監督當地郵局的日常營運。

meaning.en: The person in charge of a post office.
meaning.zh-Hant: 負責管理郵局的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘average index of market prices’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「依特定標準加權計算所選商品平均市場價格的指數」？

example.text: The overall price level rose as food and fuel became more expensive.

translation.zh-Hant: 隨著食品與燃料變貴，整體物價水準也上升了。

meaning.en: An index of the average market prices of selected goods, weighted by specified criteria.
meaning.zh-Hant: 依特定標準加權計算所選商品平均市場價格的指數。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘written promise to repay debt’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「記載償還特定債務承諾的文件，通常列有期限與利息條款」？

example.text: The borrower signed a promissory note stating the amount and due date.

translation.zh-Hant: 借款人簽署本票，載明金額與到期日。

meaning.en: A document recording a promise to repay a specific debt, often with a deadline and interest terms.
meaning.zh-Hant: 記載償還特定債務承諾的文件，通常列有期限與利息條款。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in its essential nature’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「就本質而言，或依某事物的根本性質」？

example.text: The two proposals are fundamentally different.

translation.zh-Hant: 這兩項提案在本質上不同。

meaning.en: In essence or by the very nature of something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 就本質而言，或依某事物的根本性質。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘essential service provider’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「維護公共服務基礎設施的機構」？

example.text: The public utility maintains the city's water pipes.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家公用事業機構負責維護市內的自來水管線。

meaning.en: An organization that maintains infrastructure for a public service.
meaning.zh-Hant: 維護公共服務基礎設施的機構。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘cover an insurer's risk’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「保險公司把已承保風險的全部或一部分再投保」？

example.text: The carrier will reinsure part of the earthquake risk.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家保險公司會為部分地震風險安排再保險。

meaning.en: For an insurer to insure all or part of a risk it has already underwritten.
meaning.zh-Hant: 保險公司把已承保風險的全部或一部分再投保。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘take back unpaid property’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「收回仍有款項未付清的財產」？

example.text: The lender may repossess the car if payments remain overdue.

translation.zh-Hant: 若款項持續逾期，貸款機構可能收回汽車。

meaning.en: To reclaim property for which payment is still due.
meaning.zh-Hant: 收回仍有款項未付清的財產。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘easy enough to control’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「能夠加以管理或控制」？

example.text: Dividing the project into stages made the workload manageable.

translation.zh-Hant: 把專案分成幾個階段後，工作量就變得容易掌控。

meaning.en: Capable of being managed or controlled.
meaning.zh-Hant: 能夠加以管理或控制。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘restaurant wine specialist’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在餐廳管理酒窖並為客人提供選酒建議的工作人員」？

example.text: The sommelier recommended a white wine for the seafood.

translation.zh-Hant: 侍酒師推薦了一款適合搭配海鮮的白酒。

meaning.en: A restaurant staff member who manages the wine cellar and advises guests on wine choices.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在餐廳管理酒窖並為客人提供選酒建議的工作人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in a striking manner’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以戲劇性或引人注目的方式」？

example.text: The actor paused dramatically before revealing the winner.

translation.zh-Hant: 演員以戲劇性的方式停頓了一下，才公布得獎者。

meaning.en: In a dramatic or striking manner.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以戲劇性或引人注目的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘practiced command of fundamentals’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「透過練習與熟悉而掌握基本功的熟練程度」？

example.text: Her piano technique improved through daily practice.

translation.zh-Hant: 她的鋼琴技巧透過每天練習而進步。

meaning.en: Skillful command of the fundamentals gained through practice and familiarity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 透過練習與熟悉而掌握基本功的熟練程度。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘idea with no chance’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「完全沒有成功機會的專案或提案」？

example.text: Without funding, the expansion plan is a nonstarter.

translation.zh-Hant: 沒有資金，這項擴張計畫根本不可能成功。

meaning.en: A project or proposal that has no chance of success.
meaning.zh-Hant: 完全沒有成功機會的專案或提案。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘document arguing a viewpoint’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「針對有爭議或尚未決定的議題，陳述並支持某項立場或建議的報告」？

example.text: The committee published a position paper supporting stricter safety rules.

translation.zh-Hant: 委員會發表立場文件，支持更嚴格的安全規範。

meaning.en: A report that states and supports a position or recommendation on a disputed or undecided issue.
meaning.zh-Hant: 針對有爭議或尚未決定的議題，陳述並支持某項立場或建議的報告。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘editing out sensitive content’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「編輯、刪除或遮蔽內容的過程」？

example.text: The report underwent redaction before it was released to the public.

translation.zh-Hant: 這份報告在對外公開前先經過內容遮蔽處理。

meaning.en: The process of editing or censoring content.
meaning.zh-Hant: 編輯、刪除或遮蔽內容的過程。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who reports wrongdoing’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「向主管機關檢舉問題或違規行為的人，尤指揭發雇主違規的員工或前員工」？

example.text: The whistle-blower reported the safety violations to regulators.

translation.zh-Hant: 吹哨者向主管機關檢舉了安全違規情形。

meaning.en: Someone who reports a problem or violation to the authorities, especially one committed by an employer.
meaning.zh-Hant: 向主管機關檢舉問題或違規行為的人，尤指揭發雇主違規的員工或前員工。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘written account’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「作為紀錄保存的書面說明」？

example.text: The manager prepared a write-up of the customer complaint.

translation.zh-Hant: 經理整理了一份客訴事件的書面紀錄。

meaning.en: A written account of something kept as a record.
meaning.zh-Hant: 作為紀錄保存的書面說明。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘irregular and hard to forecast’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不會以固定頻率或間隔發生」？

example.text: Bus arrivals are unpredictable during rush hour.

translation.zh-Hant: 尖峰時段的公車到站時間很難預測。

meaning.en: Not occurring at a regular rate or at fixed intervals.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不會以固定頻率或間隔發生。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘worker who clears tables’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「協助服務生收拾餐具並清潔桌面的人員」？

example.text: The busboy cleared the plates and wiped the table.

translation.zh-Hant: 收桌服務員收走盤子並擦乾淨桌面。

meaning.en: An assistant waiter who clears dishes and cleans tables.
meaning.zh-Hant: 協助服務生收拾餐具並清潔桌面的人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘sharp bend in a route’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「道路、峽谷等地形中的急彎或轉折」？

example.text: Drive slowly at the dogleg near the bridge.

translation.zh-Hant: 行經橋邊的急彎時請減速。

meaning.en: A sharp bend or turn in something such as a road or canyon.
meaning.zh-Hant: 道路、峽谷等地形中的急彎或轉折。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘free of major commitments’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「沒有太多承諾或責任，可隨心旅行或行動」？

example.text: After graduation, he was footloose and ready to travel.

translation.zh-Hant: 畢業後，他無牽無掛，準備四處旅行。

meaning.en: Free to travel or act as one pleases, with few commitments or responsibilities.

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不會嚴重威脅健康，也沒有明顯侵襲性或復發性」？

translation.zh-Hant: 檢查顯示這個腫塊是良性的。

meaning.en: Not posing a serious threat to health; not especially aggressive or recurrent.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不會嚴重威脅健康，也沒有明顯侵襲性或復發性。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘glucose circulating in the bloodstream’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「血液中的葡萄糖」？

example.text: She checks her blood sugar before breakfast.

translation.zh-Hant: 她會在早餐前測量血糖。

meaning.en: Glucose present in the blood.
meaning.zh-Hant: 血液中的葡萄糖。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘irreversible end of brain function’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「腦部功能不可逆地喪失，且腦部活動停止」？

example.text: Repeated tests confirmed brain death after the injury.

translation.zh-Hant: 多次檢查確認傷者已腦死。

meaning.en: Irreversible loss of brain function and cessation of brain activity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 腦部功能不可逆地喪失，且腦部活動停止。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘medical study of the heart’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「研究心臟結構、功能與疾病的醫學領域」？

example.text: She chose cardiology because she wanted to treat heart disease.

translation.zh-Hant: 她選擇心臟醫學作為專業，因為她想治療心臟疾病。

meaning.en: The study of the heart's structure, function, and disorders.
meaning.zh-Hant: 研究心臟結構、功能與疾病的醫學領域。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘practitioner of spinal manipulation’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「專門從事整脊療法的健康照護從業人員」？

example.text: She consulted a chiropractor about her back pain.

translation.zh-Hant: 她因背痛向整脊治療師諮詢。

meaning.en: A health-care practitioner who specializes in chiropractic treatment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 專門從事整脊療法的健康照護從業人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘cooking as a creative practice’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「烹調食物的藝術與實務」？

example.text: The restaurant treats regional cooking as a form of culinary art.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家餐廳將地方料理視為一種烹飪藝術。

meaning.en: The art and practice of cooking.
meaning.zh-Hant: 烹調食物的藝術與實務。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘doctor specializing in skin conditions’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「專門診斷與治療皮膚疾病的醫師」？

example.text: The clinic referred me to a dermatologist for the persistent rash.

translation.zh-Hant: 診所轉介我去看皮膚科醫師，檢查持續不退的疹子。

meaning.en: A physician who specializes in diagnosing and treating skin conditions.
meaning.zh-Hant: 專門診斷與治療皮膚疾病的醫師。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘swelling from excess fluid’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「體液過度積聚在身體組織或體腔中的狀況」？

example.text: The doctor checked her swollen ankles for signs of edema.

translation.zh-Hant: 醫師檢查她腫脹的腳踝是否有水腫跡象。

meaning.en: An excessive accumulation of fluid in body tissues or a body cavity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 體液過度積聚在身體組織或體腔中的狀況。

plainExpression: ledge at the bottom of a window

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ledge at the bottom of a window’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「窗框底部的水平窗台」？

example.text: She placed three small plants on the windowsill.

translation.zh-Hant: 她在窗台上放了三盆小植物。

meaning.en: The horizontal ledge at the bottom of a window frame.
meaning.zh-Hant: 窗框底部的水平窗台。

plainExpression: inflammation of the stomach and intestines

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘inflammation of the stomach and intestines’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「胃與小腸發炎的疾病，通常由感染引起」？

example.text: The doctor said the vomiting was caused by gastroenteritis.

translation.zh-Hant: 醫師說，嘔吐是腸胃炎造成的。

meaning.en: Inflammation of the stomach and small intestine, often caused by an infection.
meaning.zh-Hant: 胃與小腸發炎的疾病，通常由感染引起。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘abnormally low blood pressure’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「血壓異常偏低的狀況」？

translation.zh-Hant: 她慢慢站起來，因為低血壓常讓她感到頭暈。

meaning.en: A condition in which blood pressure is abnormally low.
meaning.zh-Hant: 血壓異常偏低的狀況。

plainExpression: hard mineral deposit in a kidney

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘hard mineral deposit in a kidney’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在腎臟內形成的堅硬礦物沉積物」？

example.text: A scan showed that the pain was caused by a kidney stone.

translation.zh-Hant: 掃描顯示，疼痛是腎結石造成的。

meaning.en: A hard mineral deposit that forms in a kidney.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在腎臟內形成的堅硬礦物沉積物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘chilled brewed tea’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「沖泡後加冰塊飲用的濃茶」？

example.text: I ordered an unsweetened iced tea with lunch.

translation.zh-Hant: 我午餐時點了一杯無糖冰茶。

meaning.en: Strong brewed tea served chilled over ice.
meaning.zh-Hant: 沖泡後加冰塊飲用的濃茶。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘replaceable printer ink container’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「裝有墨水、可以更換的墨水匣」？

example.text: The printer stopped working because the ink cartridge was empty.

translation.zh-Hant: 印表機因墨水匣用完而停止運作。

meaning.en: A replaceable cartridge that contains ink.
meaning.zh-Hant: 裝有墨水、可以更換的墨水匣。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘heat illness from sun exposure’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因過度曝曬在陽光下而引起的中暑」？

example.text: Without shade or water, hikers can quickly develop sunstroke.

translation.zh-Hant: 沒有遮蔭處或飲水時，健行者可能很快就會中暑。

meaning.en: Heatstroke caused by excessive exposure to the sun.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因過度曝曬在陽光下而引起的中暑。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘prioritizing patients by urgency’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「依病情或傷勢的緊急程度，決定病患治療順序的檢傷分類程序」？

example.text: Emergency nurses use triage to treat the most urgent cases first.

translation.zh-Hant: 急診護理師會進行檢傷分類，優先處理最緊急的病患。

meaning.en: The process of sorting patients to decide their treatment order according to urgency.
meaning.zh-Hant: 依病情或傷勢的緊急程度，決定病患治療順序的檢傷分類程序。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘transfer of blood into circulation’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「經由靜脈將血液製品輸入人體循環的醫療處置」？

example.text: The patient needed a blood transfusion after losing a large amount of blood.

translation.zh-Hant: 病患大量失血後需要接受輸血。

meaning.en: The intravenous transfer of blood products into a person's circulation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 經由靜脈將血液製品輸入人體循環的醫療處置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘legal repossession after mortgage default’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「債務人未繳房貸後，債權人依法取回房產或其他抵押品的程序」？

example.text: The homeowner sought legal advice when the bank began foreclosure.

translation.zh-Hant: 銀行開始進行抵押品查封程序時，屋主尋求了法律協助。

meaning.en: A creditor's legal process for recovering property or collateral after mortgage payments are not made.
meaning.zh-Hant: 債務人未繳房貸後，債權人依法取回房產或其他抵押品的程序。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘mobile telephone device’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「行動電話；手機」？

example.text: The company issued each salesperson a new handset.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司發給每位業務人員一支新手機。

meaning.en: A mobile phone.
meaning.zh-Hant: 行動電話；手機。

plainExpression: illness caused by a transmissible pathogen

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘illness caused by a transmissible pathogen’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由細菌、病毒等病原體引起，且能傳播給易感宿主的疾病」？

example.text: Vaccination can reduce the spread of an infectious disease.

translation.zh-Hant: 接種疫苗可以降低傳染病的傳播。

meaning.en: An illness caused by an infectious agent that can be transmitted to a susceptible host.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由細菌、病毒等病原體引起，且能傳播給易感宿主的疾病。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘hospitalized person staying overnight’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因治療需要而至少在醫院住一晚的住院病患」？

example.text: After surgery, he remained an inpatient for three nights.

translation.zh-Hant: 手術後，他住院了三晚。

meaning.en: A patient whose treatment requires at least one overnight stay in a hospital.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因治療需要而至少在醫院住一晚的住院病患。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘doctor specializing in internal medicine’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「專門從事內科醫療的醫師」？

example.text: My internist monitors my blood pressure and other long-term conditions.

translation.zh-Hant: 我的內科醫師會追蹤血壓和其他慢性疾病。

meaning.en: A physician who specializes in internal medicine.
meaning.zh-Hant: 專門從事內科醫療的醫師。

plainExpression: lower part of the digestive tract

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘lower part of the digestive tract’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由盲腸、結腸與直腸組成的消化系統部位」？

example.text: The large intestine absorbs water before waste leaves the body.

translation.zh-Hant: 大腸會在廢物排出體外前吸收水分。

meaning.en: The part of the digestive system comprising the cecum, colon, and rectum.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由盲腸、結腸與直腸組成的消化系統部位。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘walk-through device for concealed metal’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供人通過並用來偵測藏匿金屬武器或違禁品的掃描裝置」？

example.text: Passengers must pass through a metal detector before boarding.

translation.zh-Hant: 乘客登機前必須通過金屬探測門。

meaning.en: A walk-through scanning device used to detect concealed metal weapons or contraband.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供人通過並用來偵測藏匿金屬武器或違禁品的掃描裝置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘relieving symptoms without curing disease’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「旨在減緩疾病進展並緩解症狀，而非治癒疾病的」？

example.text: The doctor recommended palliative treatment to ease his pain.

translation.zh-Hant: 醫師建議採取緩和性治療來減輕他的疼痛。

meaning.en: Intended to slow disease progression and relieve symptoms rather than cure the disease.
meaning.zh-Hant: 旨在減緩疾病進展並緩解症狀，而非治癒疾病的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘safe place offering protection’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「提供安全、庇護或保護的地方」？

example.text: The quiet library became her sanctuary from the noise outside.

translation.zh-Hant: 安靜的圖書館成了她躲避外界喧囂的避風港。

meaning.en: A place that provides safety, refuge, or protection.
meaning.zh-Hant: 提供安全、庇護或保護的地方。

plainExpression: salt water from a sea or ocean

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘salt water from a sea or ocean’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「海或海洋中的鹹水」？

example.text: The research team collected seawater near the coast.

translation.zh-Hant: 研究團隊在海岸附近採集海水。

meaning.en: The salt water of a sea or ocean.
meaning.zh-Hant: 海或海洋中的鹹水。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘release from confinement or control’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「使人或事物脫離拘束或控制；釋放」？

example.text: The rescue team set free the bird after treating its injured wing.

translation.zh-Hant: 救援團隊治療鳥兒受傷的翅膀後，將牠放生。

meaning.en: To release someone or something from confinement or control.
meaning.zh-Hant: 使人或事物脫離拘束或控制；釋放。

plainExpression: wastewater and solids carried by sewers

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘wastewater and solids carried by sewers’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「混有固體廢物，並經下水道輸送以便處理或排放的污水」？

example.text: The treatment plant removes harmful material from sewage.

translation.zh-Hant: 污水處理廠會去除污水中的有害物質。

meaning.en: Water mixed with solid waste and carried by sewers for treatment or disposal.
meaning.zh-Hant: 混有固體廢物，並經下水道輸送以便處理或排放的污水。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘worn and poorly maintained’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因老舊或疏於照料而顯得破敗、凌亂或狀況不佳的」？

example.text: The hotel room looked shabby and badly needed renovation.

translation.zh-Hant: 這間飯店客房顯得老舊破敗，非常需要整修。

meaning.en: Worn, untidy, or in poor condition because of age or neglect.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因老舊或疏於照料而顯得破敗、凌亂或狀況不佳的。

plainExpression: sacred place honoring a revered figure

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘sacred place honoring a revered figure’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供人祭祀或敬奉神祇、祖先、聖人等受崇敬人物的神聖場所」？

example.text: Travelers stopped at a mountain shrine to offer a prayer.

translation.zh-Hant: 旅客在山上的神社停留祈福。

meaning.en: A sacred place where a deity, ancestor, saint, or other revered figure is honored or worshipped.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供人祭祀或敬奉神祇、祖先、聖人等受崇敬人物的神聖場所。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who skis’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「從事滑雪活動的人」？

example.text: Every skier must stay on the marked trail.

translation.zh-Hant: 每位滑雪者都必須留在標示的雪道上。

meaning.en: A person who skis.
meaning.zh-Hant: 從事滑雪活動的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘illness affecting the skin’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「影響皮膚的疾病」？

example.text: Persistent itching may be a sign of a skin disease.

translation.zh-Hant: 持續搔癢可能是皮膚病的徵兆。

meaning.en: A disease that affects the skin.
meaning.zh-Hant: 影響皮膚的疾病。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘leave without being noticed’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「趁人不注意時悄悄離開」？

example.text: She tried to slip away from the meeting before anyone noticed.

translation.zh-Hant: 她試著在沒人注意時悄悄離開會議。

meaning.en: To leave without being noticed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 趁人不注意時悄悄離開。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an occurrence of falling snow’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一次降雪或一段持續降雪的情形」？

example.text: Heavy snowfall delayed several morning flights.

translation.zh-Hant: 大雪使數班早班機延誤。

meaning.en: An occurrence or period of falling snow.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一次降雪或一段持續降雪的情形。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘sleeping deeply and quietly’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「睡得很熟、安穩而安靜的」？

example.text: The children were sound asleep by the time we arrived home.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們到家時，孩子們已經熟睡了。

meaning.en: Sleeping deeply, still, and quietly.
meaning.zh-Hant: 睡得很熟、安穩而安靜的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘talk on another person's behalf’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「代表他人發言」？

example.text: I cannot speak for the whole department, but I support the proposal.

translation.zh-Hant: 我無法代表整個部門發言，但我支持這項提案。

meaning.en: To speak on someone else's behalf.
meaning.zh-Hant: 代表他人發言。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘high-performance stylish automobile’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為高速、強大動力、靈敏操控與亮眼外觀而設計的汽車」？

example.text: He rented a sports car for the weekend drive along the coast.

translation.zh-Hant: 他租了一輛跑車，週末沿著海岸兜風。

meaning.en: A car designed for high speed, power, responsive handling, and a striking appearance.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為高速、強大動力、靈敏操控與亮眼外觀而設計的汽車。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘support despite opposition’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「支持某人或某項決定，尤其是在面對反對時仍堅定支持」？

example.text: The company will stand behind its decision despite the criticism.

translation.zh-Hant: 儘管受到批評，公司仍會支持自己的決定。

meaning.en: To support a person or decision, especially despite opposition.
meaning.zh-Hant: 支持某人或某項決定，尤其是在面對反對時仍堅定支持。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘remain completely motionless’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「停止移動並保持不動」？

example.text: Please stand still while I take your passport photo.

translation.zh-Hant: 我幫你拍護照照片時，請站著不要動。

meaning.en: To stop moving and remain motionless.
meaning.zh-Hant: 停止移動並保持不動。

plainExpression: make persistent effort toward a goal

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘make persistent effort toward a goal’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為達成某件事而認真且持續地努力」？

example.text: We strive to provide faster service without reducing quality.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們努力提供更快速的服務，同時不降低品質。

meaning.en: To make an earnest and persistent effort to achieve something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為達成某件事而認真且持續地努力。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in a distrustful manner’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以帶有懷疑的方式」？

example.text: The guard looked suspiciously at the unattended bag.

translation.zh-Hant: 警衛滿懷疑心地看著那個無人看管的包包。

meaning.en: In a way that shows or suggests suspicion.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以帶有懷疑的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘align data time or media’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「使不同裝置或格式上的資料、時間或影音保持同步」？

example.text: Remember to sync your phone before leaving for the trip.

translation.zh-Hant: 出發旅行前，記得先同步手機資料。

meaning.en: To synchronize data, time, or media across devices or formats.
meaning.zh-Hant: 使不同裝置或格式上的資料、時間或影音保持同步。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘permanent ink design on skin’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常用針與墨水刺在皮膚上的圖案」？

example.text: She chose a small flower tattoo for her wrist.

translation.zh-Hant: 她選了一個小花圖案，準備刺在手腕上。

meaning.en: An image made on the body, usually on the skin, with ink and a needle.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常用針與墨水刺在皮膚上的圖案。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person devoted to reflection’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「經常花時間思考、反省或沉思的人」？

example.text: She is a careful thinker who considers every side of an issue.

translation.zh-Hant: 她是位深思熟慮的人，會考量議題的每個面向。

meaning.en: A person who spends time thinking, contemplating, or meditating.
meaning.zh-Hant: 經常花時間思考、反省或沉思的人。

plainExpression: in a firm or secure manner

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in a firm or secure manner’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以緊密、牢固或穩妥的方式」？

example.text: Please close the bottle tightly before putting it in your bag.

translation.zh-Hant: 把瓶子放進包包前，請先把瓶蓋轉緊。

meaning.en: In a firm, close, or secure manner.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以緊密、牢固或穩妥的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘greatest possible rate of movement’?
